title: RatingHistogram

count.description: The total number of user ratings that the product has received.

rating.description: This is the average rating for the product. As part of a product review, users rate the product. Products are rated from one star (terrible) to five stars (excellent), with each star having a corresponding point value - one star gets 1 point, two stars get 2 points, and so on. If a product had one four-star rating and one five-star rating, its average rating would be 4.5, and this is the value that would appear in this field.

description: The type that defines the fields for product ratings. Only products that are in the eBay product catalog can be reviewed and rated.
